Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.

Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: We bring a 96' Chevy Tahoe into the shop and show you what to look for when buying a project.

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 1 Front Suspension Maintenance

Video.summary: While freshening up the brakes on our ’96 Chevy Tahoe, we noticed that we have a sloppy rear end.

Image.alt: Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End
Tuckered-out Tahoe Part 2 Ragged Out Rear End

Video.summary: We crew bring in a road worn 1996 4X4 Tahoe with plans to convert it into the two wheel drive version.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 1

Video.summary: Our 1996 Chevy Tahoe continues its conversion with exterior improvements and new wheels and tires.
Video.title: Revamped Tahoe Part 2

Video.summary: The guys drag a classic Chevy out of a hay barn.
Video.title: Barn Find Bow Tie

Video.summary: 'The guys install a plethora of new body panels on their barn-find Chevelle.
Video.title: Sheetmetal Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew Upgrades the suspension on a classic Chevelle for corner carving and high end handling
Video.title: Chevelle - New Legs

Video.summary: How to fit panels on a classic Chevelle, as well as repairing cracked or broken fiberglass
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits
Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits
Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Video.summary: A frame-off Chevelle Barn find restoration continues with a dazzling metallic baby blue paint job.
Video.title: 72 Chevelle: Baby Blue

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys install a brand new interior in their ’72 Chevelle project.
Video.title: Chevelle Inside Out

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy work on getting the 1972 Chevelle Supercharger Innercooler plumbed.
Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Video.summary: The 1972 Chevelle barn find project needs a fuel system to support the 1000 horsepower engine.

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust
Barn Find Chevelle- Fuel System and Exhaust

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy finish up the barn find Chevelle build and take it to a famous road in the Smoky Mountains.

Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: Street Regal gets an updated custom interior to complement it' custom paint.
Video.title: Street Regal Interior/Payoff

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: We bring in a 2001 ragged out BMW 4 door sedan, with plans of turning it into a mix-use race machine.

Image.alt: Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1
Track Killing Bimmer – Project UnSanctioned Part 1

Video.summary: We pick up the power plant for their grassroots racer and start assembling the heart of the beast.
Video.title: Power Source – Project UnSanctioned Part 2

Video.summary: The Carcass guys continue the build of their grassroots BMW race car.
Video.title: Fuel Fiasco – Project UnSanctioned Part 3

Video.summary: Our 2001 BMW race car gets a set of coilovers, as well as big brake upgrade.

Building the Beast — Project UnSanctioned Part 4

Video.summary: The Carcass crew found a 2012 Jeep JK at an auction and just had to buy it.
Video.title: Jeep JK Part 1: Suspension Overhaul

Video.summary: The guys put the final touches on the Jeep JK, adding a new bumper and winch.
Video.title: Jeep JK Part 2: Trail Accessories

Video.summary: The Carcass Duo find a left for dead tow truck that they want to give a new life through fabrication
Video.title: Junkyard Tow Truck

Video.summary: A 50 year old tow truck gets a newly fabricated rear chassis to return it to its former glory.
Video.title: Crippling Rust Repair

Video.summary: We pump up the power on our Junkyard Find Tow Truck.
Video.title: Filling the Void

Video.summary: An interior dress-up for a 50 year old tow truck giving it new life on the road.
Video.title: The Patina Polish

Video.summary: Jeremy and Jimmy wear out a pair of tires testing their Trailblazer SS in a drift like fashion.
Video.title: Drifting Trailblazer

Video.summary: The Drifting Trailblazer gets more muscle under the hood.
Video.title: Drifting Power and Style

Video.summary: Part 3 of the Drifting Trailblazer, the Trailblazer gets a suspension overhaul.
Video.title: Drifting 101

Video.summary: Jeremy and Jimmy wear out some tires with their drifting Trailblazer.
Video.title: Drifting with More Power!

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are building the ultimate kayak vehicle, a Nissan Frontier Pro 4X, in one month.
Video.title: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1
Project Rapid Runner Introduction - SEMA Build Part 1

Video.summary: Under a tight deadline for SEMA, Chris and Eric are scrambling to finish their Nissan Frontier.

Image.alt: Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2
Project Rapid Runner is Complete - SEMA Build Part 2

Video.summary: We take a 3 decade old military M530C fire truck, gut it, and turn it into a bobbed deuce.
Video.title: Military 6x6 Bobbed Deuce Part I

Video.summary: Our military deuce is turned into a customized 4x4 truck with improved suspension and load capacity.
Video.title: Military 6x6 Bobbed Deuce Part II

Video.summary: The Music City Trucks team is kicking off a 2020 Ford F-150 sport truck project.
Video.title: Ford F-150 Dream Build

Video.summary: '89 Chevy Silverado sport truck: shakedown run, dyno test, then stripped to the frame for transformation.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 1 Bare Bones

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS Chevy gets suspension mocked up: spring pocket mods, frame work, c-notch, then powder coat.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 2 Chassis Chaos

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS frame mods: boxing plates, fuel tank mockup, clutch install, drivetrain drop.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 3 Building Blocks

Video.summary: The OBS 632 is getting fuel and brake lines, custom exhaust, a stripped cab, and bed mods.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 4 Taking Shape

Video.summary: We build a Ford 9-inch for the OBS Chevy and show an inexpensive interior panel color change.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Video.summary: The OBS Chevy chassis is back from powder coat. We start assembly to get the sport truck running again.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Video.summary: Our 632 SS project nears completion with battery relocation, interior refurbishment, and traction control.

OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Video.summary: Our 632 Chevy is almost done! We're finishing the interior, adding exterior details, then hitting the road.

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie refresh their 632 BBC for a street rod. New cam, EFI, and more!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 1

Video.summary: 632 BBC dyno time! Forged short block, heads, cam, EFI. Max HP tuning!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 2

Video.summary: It's the birth of a new Mopar project as Rick and Tom set their sights on an old Dodge.
Video.title: Big Bad Dodge!

Video.summary: The front and rear suspension go bye-bye on our Dodge Dart.
Video.title: Pro Street Dodge Suspension
